property.description: IP fragmentation – a fragment with an offset less than the length of the original packet (allowed but could be an evasion).

event.description: IP fragment with same identification and an offset less than the length of the original packet
event.boolean_expression: (ip.identification == ip.identification.1) AND ((ip.frag_offset > ip.frag_offset.1) AND ((ip.frag_offset - ip.frag_offset.1) < meta.packet_len)) AND (ip.src != ip.dst)
